raw: {"perspective": "Security", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Builder script moved to archive directory but still referenced in live pipeline — creates false confidence via non-zero built_at timestamp. code-index.json is empty, violating integrity controls. Attackers could exploit stale metadata to bypass change detection.", "recommended_fix": "1. Move code_index.py out of archive/ and restore execution path. 2. Add hash check of output JSON to builder — fail if empty or unchanged. 3. Log builder result to zeus.governance_events with file count. 4. Validate built_at reflects actual content change, not just run time."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Integrity breach: false non-zero timestamp masks empty output — violates Level 0 law of verifiable state."}

findings.issue: Builder script moved to archive directory but still referenced in live pipeline — creates false confidence via non-zero built_at timestamp. code-index.json is empty, violating integrity controls. Attackers could exploit stale metadata to bypass change detection.
findings.recommended_fix: 1. Move code_index.py out of archive/ and restore execution path. 2. Add hash check of output JSON to builder — fail if empty or unchanged. 3. Log builder result to zeus.governance_events with file count. 4. Validate built_at reflects actual content change, not just run time.

whistleblower_flag: Integrity breach: false non-zero timestamp masks empty output — violates Level 0 law of verifiable state.
